nasb.text: Next to them Jedaiah the son of Harumaph made repairs opposite his house. And next to him Hattush the son of Hashabneiah made repairs.

esv.text: Next to them Jedaiah the son of Harumaph repaired opposite his house. And next to him Hattush the son of Hashabneiah repaired.

cnv.text: 再接著的一段由哈路抹的兒子耶大雅修築，就是他自己房屋對面的那段。接著這一段的是由哈沙尼的兒子哈突修築。

ccb.text: 接下来，哈路抹的儿子耶大雅修筑他房子对面的那一段。 再下一段由哈沙尼的儿子哈突修筑。
